title: The Climber
body:
This mod adds climbing mechanics
Inspired by game "White Knuckle"

Main commands:

1) "/climb on" - Enable climbing (Now you can only use your hands for climbing and nothing else.)
2) "/climb off" - Disable climbing (Returns the usual hands functionality)
3) "/climb stamina on/off" - Enable/Disable stamina system
4) "/climb config" - Adjusts some parameters
4.1) "/climb config exclude [Example: minecraft:stone]"  - Excludes blocks that you can grab onto
4.2) "/climb config include [Example: minecraft:stone]"  - Include blocks that you can grab onto
4.3) "/climb config IdleHandPos [x,y,z]" - Moving the hands to the specified coordinates relative to the 0,0,0 coordinates
